_comment: Byte budgets per smoke-test variant, ~10% above sizes measured 2026-07-08 (rustc 1.94.1: matmul 59207, lu 123751, full 738486, full-relaxed 726178). full/full-relaxed grew 2026-07-08 when faer-schur landed: real Schur + reordering is ~+26 KB; the c64 complex-Schur stack is ~+260 KB of newly monomorphized code (no complex-input kernels were in the binary before). A budget failure means dependency or codegen creep - investigate before raising. Sizes are pre-wasm-opt, pre-gzip.
